atomic_units.action: Determine the status of the BGV report
atomic_units.condition: Whether the BGV report is clear, flags a discrepancy, or cannot be completed within 10 business days
If the BGV report is clear

atomic_units.action: Escalate the BGV report to the HR Manager and the Legal team for review
atomic_units.condition: If the BGV report flags a discrepancy

atomic_units.action: Place the joining on hold until the review is complete
atomic_units.condition: If the BGV report flags a discrepancy

atomic_units.action: Proceed with a conditional joining, subject to HR Manager approval
atomic_units.condition: If the BGV report cannot be completed within 10 business days due to agency delay
